query:
INSERT INTO siteContent (page, section, contentKey, contentValue) VALUES 
('founder', 'opening', 'paragraph1', 'From the moment my eyes opened to this world, I have been drawn to truth—not from a need to know, but from a need to understand.'),
('founder', 'opening', 'paragraph2', 'That ethos of restoration and responsibility became the ground of my devotion. Over time, it expanded beyond personal integrity into a greater mission.'),
('founder', 'opening', 'paragraph3', 'Just as we are responsible for the spaces we inhabit, we are stewards of the Earth, entrusted with its vitality.');
